'''Brasck''' was a [[Brubb]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]].

==Biography==
===Hatchetman===
Brasck was a [[Brubb]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] native to [[Baros]], born in [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]]. His [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], located in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], was discovered by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], who [[Occupation of Baros|subjugated]] the world and taught it to fear and respect the Galactic Empire. Brasck never forgot the stories of Thrawn's time on Baros told to him as a child, or the harsh lessons the Grand Admiral taught his people, and forever feared the Empire.<ref name="httes" />

Brasck eventually left Baros when he was recruited as a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]], a powerful [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] operating out of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. According to Brasck, he had no choice but to work for Jabba, but he went about his job with zeal and relish, adopting some of Jabba's unscrupulous methods.<ref name="gamer">{{GamerCite|3|The Smugglers Alliance}}</ref> Brasck acted as one of Jabba's numerous "hatchetmen," a hired gun who [[Assassin/Legends|assassinated]] Jabba's personal rivals and taught lessons to any employees or business partners who displayed a lack of loyalty to the Hutt.<ref name="gg11">''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]''</ref> His was considered a heartless and unsavory character, but also brutally efficient.<ref name="tlcs">''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]''</ref>

===Taking advantage of the situation===
Brasck was considered one of the major players operating in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Borderland Regions]] between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] space. Prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Brasck worked as a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]. When Jabba died, Brasck grabbed as many followers as he could and set up his own smuggling operation, which included kidnapping and [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]].<ref name="gg11" />

[[File:Brasck.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Brasck]]

Brasck set up his headquarters aboard the starship ''[[Green Palace]]'', a vessel he kept in constant transit in the hope that such a tactic would help him void Jabba's fate. He was constantly in fear of ambush and assassination and this he always wore body armor and kept several weapons hidden on himself.

He would later partner with [[Billey]], realizing that there was strength in numbers. Before [[Talon Karrde|Karrde's]] offer of a smuggler's alliance, Brasck had decided that his organization was well-equipped to obtain the bounty on [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], despite the fact that it was Luke and his rebel friends who had killed Jabba and given Brasck the chance to rise to power.

Brasck was forced to turn down Karrde's offer of an alliance, primarily because he was worried about Imperial retribution. However, Brasck agreed that he would not interfere with the alliance, nor would he tell the Imperials about its existence.

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Star Wars: The Last Command (comic series)|comic adaptation]], Brasck is erroneously portrayed as a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]].
